verses.text: Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhad- nezzar in Babylon khua-ah salin a paikhiatpih uliante, siampite, kamsangte, leh mi khempeuhte' tungah lai khat ka khak hi
Tua hunin kumpi Jehoiakhin leh a nu, a kumpi innsungmangte, Judah gam leh Jerusalem khua-a makai upate, khutsiamte leh sikseekte, Jerusalem khua panin kipai khiatpih khinzo hi
Tua laikhak pen Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in Babylon khua Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa kiang-ah kumpi taangmi dingin a puak Shafan' tapa Elasah leh Hilkiah' tapa Gemariah-te ka puasak hi. Tua sungah
“Jerusalem panin Babylon-ah a hong kipuakkhia saltang mi khempeuhte' tungah Vanglian Topa, Pasian in hih bangin hong ci hi
Inn lam un la, a sungah teng un. Huan bawl un la, a sungah na cin'te uh ne un
Zi pi un la tanu tapa nei un. Na tapate-a' ding mo la un la, na tanute uh mo kha un; tua hi leh amau in zong tanu tapa hong nei ding uh hi. Kiam kei un la, pungzaw un

Note salin kong koihna khuapi' phattuamna ding bawl un la, tua khuapi-a' dingin Topa' tungah thu ngetsak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua khuapi in phattuamna ngah leh no zong phattuamna a ngah mah na hi uh hi
Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong genin-ah: Note' lakah a om na kamsangte uh leh na aisan theite uh' khemsa-in ta kei un la, a mangmat hong gente uh na ngai kei un
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka min tawh no tungah hong gen uh thute zuauthu hi a, ka sawllohpi ahi uh hi, Topa in ci hi
“ Topa in kong cihin-ah: Babylon khua-ah kum sawm sagih na om khit uh ciangin, note kong kan kik ding a, kong kamciamnasa hong tangtung sakin hih munah kong lakik ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, mailamah lametna note kong piakkik ding, na siatna ding uh hiloin na phattuamna ding uh geelna ka neihte kei bek in ka thei hi
Tua hun ciangin note in kei hong samin, hong pai-in thu nong ngen ding uh a, ke'n zong kong dawng ding hi
Note in kei nong zong ding uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh nong zon' uh ciangin nong mu ding uh hi

Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in nong mu ding uh a, na saltan'na uh hong beisakin, kong hawlkhiatna gam khempeuh leh mun khempeuh panin kong kaikhawm kik ding a, note kong lakkhiatna gam mahah kong tun'pih kik ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi
“Note in, ‘Eite-a' dingin Topa in Babylon khua-ah kamsang hong koihsak hi,’ ci-in gen na hih manun
David kumpi tokhom tunga tu kumpipa leh hih khuapi sunga om, note tawh saltang dingin a paikhawmlo na behte khempeuh uh tawh kisai-in Topa in kong genin-ah
En un, amaute tungah namsau tawh kithahna, kialpi leh pulnatna ka tungsak ding a, amaute, a kine theilo theigah muat ka bangsak ding hi

Amaute, namsau, kialpi, leh pulnatna tawh ka nungdelh ding a, ka hawlkhiatna ding mun khempeuhah mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat dingun simmawhna leh zahkonate ka thuaksak ding a, amaute' thuakna hangin leitung gam khempeuh ka lausak ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh, Topa in kong cihin-ah, ka nasem ka kamsangte' tung tawnin kong puak ngitnget thute amaute in thupisim loin a hong mang kei uh hi
Jerusalem khua panin Babylon khua-ah kong puakkhiat, no saltangte khempeuh aw, Topa' kammal ngai dih un

“Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in, kei' min tawh note kiangah zuauthu a hong hilh Kolaiah' tapa Ahab leh Maaseiah' tapa Zedekiah-te tawh kisai-in kong genin-ah: En un, keimah in amaute Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' khutsungah ka pia ding a, amah in note' muhin amaute a thatlum ding hi

Amaute' hangin Judah gam panin Babylon khua-ah saltang mi khempeuh in, ‘Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah leh Ahab, a hingtangin mei sungah a hal bangin Topa in nang hong hal ta hen,’ ci-in kihamsiatna-in a zang ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, Israel gamah hai gamtat uh hi: A innvengte' zite mawhpih uh a, thu ka piaklohpi ka min tawh zuauthu a gen uh hi. Keimah Topa in ka mu a, teci ka hi hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gelh hi

Nehelam khuami Shemaiah kiangah thugen dingin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kei hong sawl hi. Shemaiah in ama min tawh Jerusalem khua-a om mi khempeuhte' kiang leh siampi Maaseiah' tapa Zefaniah leh siampi khempeuhte kiangah lai na khak hi. Tua a lai sungah Shemaiah in Zefaniah' kiangah
“ Topa in siampi Jehoiada tangin nangmah siampi-in hong koih khinzo a, Topa' biakinnpi sungah a ukpi ding na hi ta hi. Tua ahih manin thu a hilh mawkmawk mihaite thong kia sakin kol na bulh ding hi
Bang hangin note kiangah thu a hong hilh Anathoth khuami Jeremiah tailo na hi hiam

Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Babylon khua-ate lai hong khakin, sawt veipi sal tang ding na hih manun, inn lamin a sungah teng un la, huan bawlin a sunga na cin'te uh ne un, hong ci hi,” ci-in a gelh hi. Hih bangin Zefaniah' kiangah a laikhakna thu tawh kisai Shemaiah kiangah a gen dingin Pasian in kei hong sawl hi
Siampipa Zefaniah in hih laikhak kei kiangah hong simkhia hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Saltang mi khempeuhte' kiangah Nehelam khuami Shemaiah tawh kisai-in Topa' thugenna hih bangin zasak in: Kong sawl lohpi Shemaiah in note kiangah thu hong gen a, zuauthu hong umsak ahih manin

Topa in kong cihin-ah: En un, keimah in Nehelam khuami Shemaiah leh a suan a khakte gim ka pia ding hi. Amah in keimah hong langpan'na ding thu gen ahih manin ka mite-a' dingin a hoih ka bawl ding nate, amah leh a suan a khakte khat beek in a mu kei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi.
